content.text: How can I extract a unique list of all clinical gene symbols from the specified panels of a case object?
What is the function likely to return if none of the provided panel IDs are found in the database?
If no matching panels are found, the `$match` filter returns an empty cursor. The final function call `set(item['_id'] for item in query)` will then correctly return an empty set.
Thanks, that clarifies how handling missing data works here.
